name: Maj Invest Value Aktier SRI+
summary: Maj Invest Value Aktier SRI+ is an investment fund that focuses on value investing in equities while adhering to socially responsible investing (SRI) principles. The fund aims to identify and invest in undervalued stocks with strong potential for long-term growth, while also considering environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors. It integrates SRI considerations into its investment selection process.
